JT-006.note: Added backend/mypy.ini with strict Python 3.12 mypy defaults and README guidance. Verified typed inline code passes and untyped inline code fails with no-untyped-def.

JT-008.note: Added backend/app/main.py with create_app(), module-level app, and empty API router registration. Added focused app-factory pytest coverage. Verification passed: pytest focused, ruff, strict mypy, full backend pytest, import smoke check, and no-mistakes checks-passed.

JT-005.note: Added backend/ruff.toml with Python 3.12 target, focused lint rule set, and format defaults, using a standalone config (not pyproject.toml) to avoid coupling with JT-004's open project scaffolding. Documented README commands. Verified via stdin: ruff check caught F401/E741/C416 on bad code, passed on clean code, and ruff format normalized spacing.

JT-004.note: Added backend/pyproject.toml [project]/[dependency-groups] and uv.lock, making the backend a uv-managed project pinned to Python 3.12 (fastapi, uvicorn, pydantic, starlette runtime; ruff, mypy, pytest, httpx2 dev). Merged additively with JT-006's existing [tool.mypy] section. Rebased twice onto main as JT-007/008/009/010/012/013 landed concurrently; resolved conflicts by hand after opting out of the no-mistakes gate (its document step hit a session usage limit) at the user's direction to push and open the PR directly.
